title: Rule-Declare-DecisionTable
description: JSON schema for creating a Pega Decision Table (Rule-Declare-DecisionTable). Fields marked x-pega-autoFill are injected by the builder and may be omitted from payloads. Uses simple string arrays for pyCondition and pyResults. Supports multi-result tables via pyPropertyColumns for setting multiple output properties per row.

pyClassName.description: The Pega class this decision table belongs to (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase').

pyRuleName.description: Internal name (PascalCase, no spaces). must match pyPurpose exactly

pyPurpose.description: Purpose identifier — must match pyRuleName exactly.

pyDescription.description: Developer-facing description of the table's purpose.

pyRuleSet.description: Rule set the table is saved to.

pyRuleAvailable.description: Availability status. 'Final' means cannot be overridden.

pyDefaultAction.description: Action for the default/otherwise branch — 'RETURN' to return a value, 'SET' to execute pyDefaultResultPropSet side-effects without returning.

pyDefaultResult.description: Fallback result when no row matches.

pyDoHarvesting.description: Whether Pega harvests dependencies from this rule.

pyAllowedToLoadResults.description: Whether results can be loaded from external sources.

pyReturnColumnHasAccess.description: Whether the return column has access control.

pyRedirectRule.description: String boolean — whether this table redirects to another rule.

pyColumns.description: Condition columns — array of Embed-DecisionTable-Column. Each column's pyCondition array length must match pyResults array length.

pyResults.description: Result values per row — simple string array (e.g., ['Pass', 'Fail']). Array length must match pyCondition arrays.

pyParameters.description: Input parameters for parameter-based tables. Required when pyProperty uses Param.Name notation.

pyDelegatedRestrictions.description: CRITICAL: PageGroup controlling Dev Studio visibility. Without pyAllowedToReturnValues='yes', the Return column is invisible.

pyPropertyColumns.description: Property set output columns — set additional output properties per row alongside the return value. Each column's pyPropertyValues length must match pyResults length.

pyDefaultResultPropSet.description: Default values for property columns when no row matches — one entry per pyPropertyColumns entry. Parallel array with pyPropertyColumns.

pyPagesAndClasses.description: Named page class mappings — required when property column paths reference page lists (e.g., .pxResults(<APPEND>).Property). Maps page names to their Pega class.

pyEvaluateAllRows.description: Evaluate all rows instead of first-match-wins. Set to 'yes' when building lists via <APPEND> macros. Also exists in pyDelegatedRestrictions.default — both should be consistent.

pyAllowedValues.description: Authored vocabulary of possible return values, each optionally carrying SET side-effects that fire when a row with that return value matches. Superset of pyResults — may include values not currently used by any row. When present, must stay consistent with pyResults. See references/allowed-values.md.

pyAllowedResultsProperty.description: Optional property whose allowed-values list bounds the return-value vocabulary. When empty or omitted, the vocabulary is free-form.

pyInitialPropSet.description: Pre-logic 'Initialize with' block — unconditional property SETs that run before any row evaluation. Seeds the target page with defaults or derived values that conditions can then read. Each entry is an Embed-ModelParams with a property target and a Pega expression. Omit or leave empty for most tables — adding entries flags the rule as 'Advanced' in Dev Studio.

Column.description: A condition column (Embed-DecisionTable-Column). pyCondition is a simple string array with operator+value concatenated per entry (e.g., ['>=80', '<80']).

pyProperty.description: Property to evaluate — dot-prefix for case properties (.Score), Param.Name for parameters.

pyColumnDataType.description: Data type — 'truefalse' for boolean properties, 'identifier' for key/ID properties, 'dateTime'/'timeofday' for temporal types. Pega auto-corrects if mismatched with property type.

pyCondition.description: Condition values per row — simple string array with operator+value concatenated (e.g., '>=80', '<0.20', 'Active'). Array length must match pyResults.

pyDefaultOperator.description: Default comparison operator. '!=' for not-equals matching. Optional — operator is embedded in pyCondition strings.

pyUseRange.description: Whether this column uses range-based conditions.

pyUseRangeMax.description: Whether this column uses range max values.

pyOrConditions.description: OR conditions — allows a single row to match multiple values. Each entry targets a specific row by pyRowNum and provides alternative values.

pyParametersParamName.description: Parameter name — referenced in pyProperty as Param.Name.

OrCondition.description: An OR condition entry (Embed-DecisionTable-OrCondition). Allows a single row to match any of multiple values instead of requiring separate rows.

pyRowNum.description: 1-based row number this OR condition applies to (e.g., '1', '2').

pyOrCondition.description: Alternative values for the row — simple string array (e.g., ['Active', 'Pending', 'Open']).

DelegatedRestrictions.description: PageGroup keyed by 'default' — controls Dev Studio visibility and editability.

pyAllowedToReturnValues.description: CRITICAL: 'yes' shows the Return column in Dev Studio.

pyEvaluateAllRows.description: Evaluate all rows vs first match.

PropertyColumn.description: A property set output column (Embed-DecisionTable-PropertyColumn). Sets an additional output property per row, parallel with pyResults.

pyProperty.description: Property path to set — dot-prefix (.PropertyName), Param.Name, or page list macros (.PageList(<APPEND>).PropertyName, .PageList(<LAST>).PropertyName).

pyPropertyValues.description: Output values per row — simple string array. Array length must match pyResults. Values containing class names or rule names use embedded quotes (e.g., '"Link-Attachment"').

pyDefaultPropertySetOperator.description: Operator for setting the property — typically '='. May be empty string on some existing rules.

pyPropSetDefaultValue.description: Default value when no row matches. Can be empty string, literal value, or Param.Name reference.

pyColumnRestrictions.description: Per-column edit restrictions. Server may scaffold this when pyHasAccess is 'true'.

ModelParams.description: A model parameter entry (Embed-ModelParams) — maps a property name to a default value for property column fallbacks.

pyPropertiesName.description: Property path — should match the corresponding pyPropertyColumns entry's pyProperty.

pyPropertiesValue.description: Default value — can be empty string, literal value, or Param reference.

PagesAndClasses.description: A page-to-class mapping (Embed-PagesAndClasses). Required when property column paths reference page lists with <APPEND>/<LAST> macros.

pyPageClass.description: Pega class name for the page (e.g., 'Embed-Rule-Obj-Guardrail').

AllowedValue.description: An authored return-value vocabulary entry (Embed-Decision-AllowedValues). Optionally carries SET side-effects via pyPropertySet that fire for every row returning this value.

pyAllowedValue.description: The return value name (e.g., 'Approved', 'Critical'). Must match an entry in pyResults to be active, but unused vocabulary entries are allowed.

pzIsAllowedResultsPropSetExist.description: 'true' when SET side-effects are attached to this value, 'false' for vocabulary-only stubs.

pyPropertySet.description: SET actions that fire as side-effects when a row returns this value.

AllowedValueAction.description: A SET action within an allowed-value entry (Embed-ModelParams). Sets a property to a literal or expression when the parent allowed value's return value is matched.

pyPropertiesName.description: Target property — dot-prefix for case properties (.someProperty) or Param.someParam for parameters.

pyPropertiesValue.description: Value to set — literal string, quoted class name ('"Rule-Decision-Scorecard"'), or Pega expression (ternary, @String.* calls, etc.).

pyExpressionBuilder.description: Expression source — same value as pyPropertiesValue when using expressions. Optional; used by the UI expression editor cache.

InitialPropSetEntry.description: A pre-logic initialization entry (Embed-ModelParams). Sets a property to a Pega expression result before any row evaluation. pyPropertiesValue is compiled as a Pega expression at assembly time — supports literals, property references, Param.* references, and function calls.

pyPropertiesName.description: Target property on the evaluated page (e.g., '.Discount', '.Address.City'). Standard dot/index syntax.

pyPropertiesValue.description: Pega expression to evaluate and assign — literals ('0', '"Pending"'), property references (.OtherProp), Param.* references, function calls (@DateTime.addDays(.StartDate, 7)).
